brand.name: Mile Hi City Pickleball
brand.intro: Nine voices. One court. Every week, fresh stories from the players shaping pickleball culture in Colorado.

thisWeek.title: our 2026 summer anthem
thisWeek.brief: Hook (0-3s): creator walks onto the navy 'GAME ON' court, phone out, lip-syncing straight to camera to Josh Fawaz's 'Like a Prayer' remix. On-screen text: '2026 summer anthem hits different at Mile Hi.' Seven seconds is all you need — cut to the squad rallying in slow-mo to the chorus. End caption: #summeranthem. Film from the baseline on Court 1 so the full JOOLA net and GAME ON wall are both in frame. Zero editing required — the song does all the work. Post before Thursday; trend window is hottest now.
thisWeek.trendSource: Josh Fawaz's 'Like a Prayer' (Madonna remix) hit 16M Spotify streams and is TikTok's unofficial 2026 Summer Anthem — small creators are reporting millions of views on first attempts with the 7-second lip-sync format (NewEngen June 2026 trend report, tokchart.com). The second example URL is a TikTok discover/search page, not a specific video.

thisWeek.title: pickleball at halftime
thisWeek.brief: FIFA World Cup kicks off June 11 — tap the fever before it peaks. Hook (0-3s): creator stares into camera holding a soccer ball, looks left, looks right, drops it, pulls out a JOOLA paddle. On-screen text: 'nobody is watching the halftime show anyway.' Cut to a 10-second rally on the navy court. End on the GAME ON wall: 'find us at Mile Hi during every US match.' No actual World Cup footage needed — the joke is entirely in the pivot. Film and post before June 11 to catch the pre-tournament buzz when search volume is climbing.
thisWeek.trendSource: FIFA World Cup 2026 opens June 11 across the US, Canada, and Mexico. TikTok is FIFA's official 'Preferred Platform' with 30 Creator Correspondents activated (TikTok Newsroom + Social Media Today, March 2026). #worldcup content is flooding every FYP this week — sport-adjacent brands that post before opening day capture the trend window at lowest competition.

thisWeek.title: 3 shots jill says first
thisWeek.brief: Hook (0-3s): creator holds a JOOLA paddle up to camera, big on-screen text: 'Coach Jill says beginners only need 3 shots. Here they are.' Shot 1 — the dink: soft drop over the net at the kitchen line, label it on screen. Shot 2 — the reset: slow the pace when you're being pushed back, label it. Shot 3 — the third-shot drop: from the baseline back into the kitchen, label it. For each, one-line tip in text overlay and a quick demo — imperfect reps are fine. End on the GAME ON wall: 'that's it. go play.' Coach Jill doesn't need to appear on camera; her name is the authority. Being a beginner figuring it out IS the content.
thisWeek.trendSource: The 'number + promise' hook is one of the highest watch-time formats on TikTok for educational content in 2026 (NewEngen June trends report). Pickleball instructional content outperforms pure-play clips in average watch time per Feedspot's Top 100 Pickleball TikTok Influencers 2026 rankings. Both example URLs are TikTok discover/search pages, not specific videos.

thisWeek.title: pack my court bag
thisWeek.brief: Hook (0-3s): flat lay of a court bag with a JOOLA paddle centered in frame, on-screen text 'come pack my pickleball bag with me.' Voiceover or text-over walks each item as you drop it in: JOOLA paddle ('the GOAT'), court shoes ('Vans will betray you on these courts'), water bottle ('11 indoor courts = you will sweat'), hair ribbon or wristband ('tenniscore tax'), snack. 60–90 seconds max. End on walking through the Mile Hi front door or hitting the navy GAME ON wall on arrival. Close with comment bait: 'what's the one thing you always forget?' Bag-reveal GRWM earns tags and reply-chains — that's the distribution strategy. Film at home, no court time needed.
thisWeek.trendSource: GRWM 'pack my bag' consistently over-indexes for sport and fitness brands on TikTok — no court access required, filmed at home, drives pre-visit anticipation and location tagging (Dash Social format performance report, May 2026). Both example URLs are TikTok discover/search pages, not specific videos.

weeklyReport.summary: First week — squad is filming, numbers come next Monday. This week: riding Josh Fawaz's 2026 Summer Anthem wave, FIFA World Cup energy (opens June 11), a Coach Jill beginner skill tutorial, and a court bag GRWM.
watchOuts: Quinn hasn't posted — TikTok and Instagram handles still TBD
Caroline's social handles still missing — can't tag or track her content
Izzy B has video filmed but no confirmed post date yet
